title: Palembang、South Sumatra — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Palembang、South Sumatra的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Palembang是South Sumatra的一个城市，人口约1,708,000。South Sumatra’s capital and one of Indonesia’s oldest cities, known for its Ampera Bridge and pempek cuisine.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
